result:
Two approval artifacts written:

- `runtime/queue/approvals/suspicious-invoice-m8.md` - flags the $9,800 wire request as a likely fraud pattern; no payment made, no reply sent, action required from Dana.
- `runtime/queue/approvals/thursday-5pm-conflict.md` - documents the 5pm double-book on 6/18 (Northwind call vs. Theo pickup) with three options; no calendar change made, no replies sent.
